_metadata.description: biothings-cli end-to-end validation workflow for generated plugins. Run all 5 steps in order after writing plugin files.
_metadata.source: Hardened from SIGNOR v1.0 silent-failure and MetaNetX 1.2M-doc builds

prerequisites.note: CLI uses local SQLite data_src_database + .biothings_hub/archive/ — no external services needed

git_setup.reason: biothings-cli calls git rev-list and git remote internally; fails without a proper repo
commands: git add manifest.json parser.py version.py README.md
notes: git init + commit: satisfies git rev-list -1 <branch> during upload
Dummy origin: satisfies git remote lookups; points to /dev/null, nothing pushed
Local-only operations — no GitHub repo or remote push required

clean_hub_state.reason: Stale SQLite locks or cached canceled status from prior failures block new uploads

files_to_remove.data_src_database-journal: SQLite WAL/journal lock from interrupted upload
files_to_remove.data_src_database: Collection store; must recreate after removing journal

steps.pass_criterion: Exit code 0; no ERROR or FAIL lines in stdout/stderr
common_failures: parser ref points at nonexistent function
steps.on_failure: Record errors in cli_validation.steps[].errors[] and STOP

steps.purpose: Invoke version.py:get_release(), download all data_url files to .biothings_hub/archive/
steps.pass_criterion: Exit code 0; archive folder exists; all data_url files present and non-empty
common_failures: version.py returns None (falls back to date string)
steps.on_failure: Capture URL + HTTP status; if one URL in list fails, whole dump fails

steps.purpose: Run parser.load_data(data_folder), write docs to local SQLite collection
steps.pass_criterion: Exit code 0; non-zero document count; collection in subsequent list output
common_failures: Parser raises (check stderr even on exit 0)
steps.on_failure: Record exception + doc count. EXIT 0 WITH documents_yielded==0 IS FAILURE — flag as silent-zero-doc
steps.critical_rule: A successful exit with documents_yielded == 0 is treated as FAILURE

steps.purpose: Print Dump and Upload state (data folder, collections, file list). No mutations.
steps.pass_criterion: Both Dump and Upload boxes populated; Collections lists <plugin_name>; expected files present
common_failures: Collections empty after successful upload = silent doc drop
steps.on_failure: If Collections empty, upload silently dropped all docs — investigate via inspect

steps.purpose: Sample docs from collection, report field-level statistics (key presence, types, ranges)
steps.pass_criterion: All docs have _id:string; datasource key in 100% of samples; no unexpectedly all-null fields

flags.-s: Always provide -s <plugin_name>; required when multiple uploaders exist
flags.--limit: Use 1000-10000 for >100K doc collections; omit only for final comprehensive check

common_failures: nested single-key dicts (should be flattened by unlist)
steps.on_failure: Record field-level stats in cli_validation.steps[].errors[]; surface as parser fix-up task

rerun_cleanup.rerun: biothings-cli dataplugin dump && biothings-cli dataplugin upload

status_values.failed: Exit non-zero, OR exit 0 but pass criterion failed (e.g. zero docs on upload)

recording_results.rollup_rule: smoke_test.status = passed only when all 5 steps pass
